0100100000100111 0111010100111100 1 -> sum: 1011110101100100, cout: 0
1010000110100111 1001111110110011 0 -> sum: 0100000101011010, cout: 1

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
